title: Feldkirch, Vorarlberg — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Feldkirch, Vorarlberg: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Feldkirch is a city in Vorarlberg with a population of 33,420. A picturesque medieval city in western Austria, the first town in the Habsburg Empire, with a beautifully preserved old town and the Schattenburg Castle.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
